funds_data.description: The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks to offer a higher yield than cash instruments while maintaining a low duration by investing primarily in fixed income securities consistent with capital preservation. The fund invests in individual fixed income securities without restriction as to issuer credit quality, capitalization or security maturity. The fund is non-diversified.
